problema: The team registers the same order in the sales system and then manually enters it back into the warehouse system.If someone forgets or makes a mistake on one, the data doesn't add up and no one knows which one is correct until the problem has escalated.
solucion: We build a direct integration between the two systems through automated workflows: when a sales order is closed, the warehouse movement is automatically created with the same data, without human intervention.The team stops touching anything.Result: 2 hours per day recovered and stock errors eliminated.

problema: Every week, a person spends the entire morning manually generating invoices from Excel, copying order data, adjusting the format and sending them one by one by email.If there is volume, it stays late.If you are on sick leave, you are not billed.
solucion: We connect the ordering system with a marketplace billing tool: when an order is marked as delivered, the invoice is generated, sent to the customer by email and recorded in accounting alone.Nobody has to do anything.Result: from 4 hours per week to 10 minutes of review.

problema: Every day delivery notes, supplier budgets or work reports arrive in PDF.Someone has to open them one by one, read the data and transcribe it into the system.With 30-40 documents a day, that becomes a part-time job.
solucion: We implement an automatic extraction flow with intelligent OCR: the documents arrive in a folder or email, the system reads them, extracts the defined fields (supplier, amount, reference, date) and dumps them into the database or ERP.The operator only checks the exceptions.Result: from 4 hours a day to less than 20 minutes.

problema: Accounting says that €180,000 was invoiced last month.Sales says they were €195,000.Warehouse has another number.Each department works with its own sheet and no one knows what the real figure is until they are manually crossed at closing.
solucion: We create a data pipeline that extracts information from each source (ERP, CRM, Excel, accounting) and consolidates it into a central database with agreed business rules.All departments consult that single repository.Result: closing meetings that went from 3 hours to 20 minutes, without discussions about the correct data.

problema: There is an Excel master that no one touches because the last time someone modified it they broke the formulas.There is another one with last month's data that circulates by email.And a third that only the person who created it two years ago understands.
solucion: We migrate the data to a structured database with a simple interface for the team to enter and query data.Critical formulas become system logic, not brittle cells.No one breaks anything by accident again.

problema: The conditions agreed with a client are in the salesperson's WhatsApp.The status of an urgent order is in the email of someone who is traveling.When there is a problem, no one has access to the information they need without disturbing someone else.
solucion: We set up a market-leading CRM where every customer interaction is automatically recorded: synchronized emails, call notes, agreements and order statuses.Anyone on the team opens the client's file and sees the entire history without asking anyone.

titulo: No financial visibility in real time
problema: To find out how much has been billed in the month you have to ask the administrator, who takes a day to cross-check data from several sites.When the data arrives, it is already two days late and does not include today's orders.
solucion: We built a dashboard with market visualization tools connected directly to operational sources: ERP, billing and bank.The panel shows real-time invoiced, collected, pending collection and forecast for the month.Accessible from your mobile, without asking anyone.

problema: You work a lot with certain clients, you give them priority, you give them discounts.But no one has ever calculated whether this relationship is profitable once the service time, returns and payment terms that always lengthen are taken into account.
solucion: We cross-reference sales data, product costs, logged team hours, and payment terms to calculate the actual margin per customer.We build a quarterly updateable profitability table.The output is a ranking that allows conditions to be renegotiated with specific data in hand.

problema: The margins should be 28% but the actual result is 19%.There are 9 points that disappear somewhere but no one knows where exactly.Losses, unbilled time or out-of-process purchases are suspected, but there is no data.
solucion: We build a cost analysis model that crosses ERP purchases, production system hours and actual billing.In most cases we find 2-3 concrete and quantifiable leaks in less than two weeks.The output is a report with the origin of the deviation, amount and corrective action.

problema: There are invoices that have been overdue for months that no one has claimed because there is no clear follow-up process.The person responsible for collections keeps it in his head, but when there is a lot of volume it escapes him.The result is accumulated debt that is sometimes no longer collected.
solucion: We automate the collection cycle with automated workflows: the system detects overdue invoices, sends a first automatic reminder after 3 days, a second after 10 and alerts the person responsible after 20. All configurable.The person in charge only manages cases that do not respond to the automatic process.Reduced average DSO in 18 days.

problema: At the beginning of the month it seems that there is liquidity.At the end of the month you have to move money between accounts to cover payroll.The problem is not that little is sold, it is that we do not know when the money is going to come in or when the large payments are going to come out.
solucion: We build a 13-week rolling cash flow model in a structured sheet connected to the bank and the billing system: expected receipts by client according to payment history, committed exits by supplier and payroll.It is updated only every week.The result is seeing treasury tensions 4-6 weeks in advance.

problema: They are considering hiring two more people or investing in a new machine.The decision is made based on feelings and what the tax advisor says, who only sees last year's numbers.There is no impact analysis or return projection.
solucion: We build a simulation model with the company's real data: current cost of the process, cost of the solution, estimated savings per month and amortization point.Two or three scenarios with adjustable variables are presented.The output is a comparative table that allows you to defend or discard the investment with your own numbers.

problema: The senior technician spends two hours each morning copying data from one system to another, generating reports in Excel and sending them by email to the area managers.He is the most expensive person in the department and does work that an intern, or a machine, could do.
solucion: We automate the entire flow with automated workflows: data extraction from the source system, transformation and loading into the report template, sending by email to the configured recipients.Everything at the defined time, without anyone touching anything.The technician recovers 8-10 hours per week.The cost is amortized in less than 6 weeks.

problema: The data operator position has an annual turnover of 80%.Training each new person takes 3 weeks.When someone leaves, they take the knowledge with them and errors in the process are triggered.Nobody wants to do that job and it shows.
solucion: We automate data capture and validation with structured forms and integrated business rules: the system accepts only valid data, warns of errors in real time and records everything on its own.The role becomes exception review, not manual entry.Error rate reduced by 94%, turnover almost eliminated.

problema: When the owner goes on vacation, business slows down.Decisions accumulate, processes that only he knows are paused and the team works in standby mode.It is not a trust problem, it is that the processes are in your head, not documented anywhere.
solucion: We do process mapping sessions with the owner: we record, transcribe and structure each critical flow with decision tree, responsible parties and exceptions.Repetitive steps are automated with workflows or custom programs if the process is complex.Each process has an assigned owner and clear rules.The business works the same without him present.

problema: There are things that everyone knows need to change: the ordering system is a disaster, the customer onboarding process is manual, internal communication is chaotic.But there is always something more urgent.They've been saying it for two years and nothing changes.
solucion: We work in 2-week sprints with a concrete and functional deliverable at the end of each one.We don't do 6-month projects: the first sprint already solves something real and measurable.This unblocks paralysis because there are visible results from the first week.

titulo: Errors that are repeated without solution
problema: Every month there are errors on the delivery notes: wrong item, wrong quantity, wrong address.They are corrected, the client apologizes, and the following month it happens again.It is not laziness, it is that the process has a point of structural failure that no one has attacked.
solucion: We map the order preparation process and identify the exact point where the error is introduced.We added a layer of automatic validation: the system compares the scanned item with the order and blocks the shipment if it doesn't match.In distribution companies this has reduced delivery incidents by more than 80% in the first month.

problema: A customer calls to ask about his order.No one knows exactly what condition it is in without calling the warehouse, which calls the carrier, who sometimes doesn't pick up the phone.The customer has been waiting 20 minutes to receive a response that should be immediate.
solucion: We implement a synchronized order status system between warehouse, logistics and customer service: prepared, shipped, in transit, delivered.Every status change is updated in real time.The salesperson sees the status from their tool without calling anyone, and the customer receives an automatic notification at each step.

titulo: Leads that go cold due to slow response
problema: A potential client requests a quote via the website or by email.The response takes 2-3 days because information must be collected, calculated and written.By then, the customer has already received a response from the competition and has made a decision.
solucion: We build an automated flow: when a request arrives, the system sends a personalized response in minutes with the most relevant information and, if the product or service is standard, an automatically generated indicative quote.The salesperson only intervenes to close.Lead conversion rate in meetings increased 40% in 60 days.

problema: The company has a website: brand, contact, perhaps a static catalog.But the channel does not generate sales: customers continue calling or writing on WhatsApp, and the traffic does not convert into orders.This is usually because the website is just a showcase (no prices, no stock, no reservation or basket), there is no clear next step after the visit, or the forms and queries do not reach a follow-up process.The cost of maintenance is not amortized in direct income and gives the impression that "the Internet is useless for this business."
solucion: We design a purchasing or request journey according to the model: catalog with prices or guided quote request, online reservations or minimum order, payment gateway or integration with POS/ERP depending on volume.We connect forms and events from the web to the CRM or to an automatic response flow and alerts to the team.We measure with analytics which pages and campaigns bring purchase intent.Result: the website stops being a digital brochure and becomes a measurable channel that captures and closes orders without depending only on the telephone.

problema: There are emails from clients that go unanswered because they arrive when the tray is full, because the person responsible was busy or because someone assumed that someone else had responded to them.When the customer writes again, he is already upset.
solucion: We configure a tray management system with automatic assignment by keywords or sender, SLA timer visible to the team and automatic alert if an email does not receive a response within the defined period.Each message has a person in charge and a deadline.Complaints about silence disappear.

problema: A customer submits a technical query on Friday afternoon.On Monday at noon there was still no response because the technician did not see it, or saw it and left it for later.The client interprets that it is not important for the company and begins to look at alternatives.
solucion: We deploy a chatbot trained with the product catalog, frequently asked questions and company procedures.Instantly respond to common queries, 24/7.Complex questions are referred to the person with the context of the conversation already loaded.First response time: hours to seconds.

problema: A customer has always bought the same product for three years.No one has ever offered you the complementary products that make sense for you to buy, because there is no system that identifies that opportunity or notifies the salesperson.
solucion: We cross-reference the customer's purchase history with the complete catalog and define affinity rules: who buys A usually also buys B. The system detects customers who meet the profile and have not yet purchased B, and generates an alert for the salesperson with the context ready.The average ticket goes up without needing new customers.

problema: When a customer calls with a complaint, the salesperson doesn't know what they sold or when.The support person doesn't know if it is an old or new customer.The administration person does not know if he has outstanding invoices.Each department has its part of the puzzle and no one has the whole picture.
solucion: We implement a CRM from the market or develop a custom one if the existing ones do not fit the business, with automatic synchronization of emails, ERP orders and incidents.Every time someone opens a customer file they see the complete history: last purchases, conversations, pending invoices and team notes.Without asking anyone.

titulo: Management from last month to bull
problema: To know if the month is going well or badly, you have to wait for the accounting close, which arrives in the middle of the following month.By then, what went wrong is beyond remedy.Decisions are always made with data from 6 weeks ago.
solucion: We build an operational dashboard with market visualization tools connected to business sources in real time: sales of the day, accumulated margin of the month, pending collections and comparison with the same period of the previous year.Accessible from mobile.The management team knows how the month is going today and can act before closing.

problema: There are people on the team who work a lot and others who work little.Everyone says they are busy.Without objective metrics, it's impossible to know who is performing, where there are bottlenecks, and how to best allocate workload.
solucion: We define with the team 3-5 measurable output metrics per role (orders processed, response time, incidents resolved) and we build a weekly monitoring panel.Without cameras or microphones, with data from systems that already exist.The manager has real visibility to make decisions about load and resources.

titulo: Processes that live in someone's head
problema: There are critical processes that only one person knows how to do.If that person is missing, the process stops.If you leave the company, you take the knowledge with you.They have tried to document it several times but it is never finished because there is no time.
solucion: We do recording sessions with the person who knows the process: we watch them do it, we break it down step by step, we document the decisions and exceptions in a decision tree format.Repetitive steps are automated with workflows or with a custom program if the logic is complex.The result is a living operating manual that anyone can follow from day one.

titulo: Systems that do not share data
problema: Warehouse ERP and sales CRM are from different manufacturers and have never spoken to each other.To find out if a product is in stock, the salesperson has to call the warehouse or access a different system.Data always lags behind reality.
solucion: We build a bidirectional integration between the two systems using their APIs or through automated workflows if they do not have a direct connection.If the integration is complex, we develop a custom connector: stock updated in the CRM in real time, CRM orders reflected in the ERP without manual entry.

problema: The company has grown 30% in two years and the administrative team has had to grow proportionally to absorb the volume.Every time there is more work, the solution is to hire one more person.There comes a point when the model is not sustainable.
solucion: We identify processes that scale linearly with volume (invoicing, confirmations, tracking) and we automate them: the system does the same work for 100 orders as it does for 10. A company in the distribution sector doubled its volume in 18 months without adding any people to the administrative area.

problema: When there is a problem with an order, with a supplier or with a customer, the company finds out when the customer calls complaining, when the delivery no longer arrives on time or when the non-payment has already been going on for weeks.Always in reactive mode.
solucion: We configure an automatic alert system on critical business indicators: order without movement for more than 4 hours, delivery delayed compared to the promised date, invoice due in 72 hours, stock below the minimum.Alerts arrive by email or Slack depending on preference.The team acts before the customer complains.

titulo: Know that you can improve but not how
problema: Everyone is clear that there are processes that can be improved.The operations manager has a list of 12 things he would change if he could.But you don't know where to start, how much it would cost, or what impact each improvement would have.
solucion: We carry out an operational diagnosis of 2-3 sessions: we map the current processes, we measure the real time they consume and the cost per error.We prioritize by economic impact and ease of implementation.The output is a roadmap with the 3-5 projects with the highest return, their estimated cost and the expected savings for each one.

titulo: Obsolete tools that no one touches
problema: The system that manages orders is 12 years old.It works, more or less.But it has no API, it doesn't export data easily, and any changes require calling the provider and waiting weeks.Nobody touches it because it's scary that something will break.
solucion: We build an integration layer around the old system without modifying it: we extract the data we need using scrapers or scheduled exports, process it in an intermediate system and send it to where it is needed.The old system still works the same but is now connected to the rest of the ecosystem.

titulo: The change that is always postponed
problema: For three years now we have been saying that we have to change the way projects are managed.Everyone agrees.But every time it is raised, the answer is that right now is not a good time, that we have to finish this first, we will see.
solucion: We started with a 2-week pilot in parallel to the current operation: the team tests the new system without abandoning the old one.When they see that it works better, change happens on its own.We don't force anything.We reduce friction to a minimum so that the excuse of 'now is not the time' no longer makes sense.

titulo: Technology perceived as something for adults
problema: The owner has seen cases of digitalization in large companies with millions of investments.The conclusion is that this is not for them, that they are too small, that they do not have an IT department or budget for those things.
solucion: We work exclusively with companies of 10 to 200 people.We use market tools and develop customized solutions when necessary, without our own infrastructure or internal technical team required.The first project usually has a cost lower than the monthly expense generated by the problem it solves.

titulo: Paralysis due to lack of clarity
problema: You have seen demos, you have spoken with suppliers, you have read about automation.There are too many options and no one is clear about what fits the company, what is a priority or how much it should cost.The result is doing nothing.
solucion: The first meeting is for diagnosis, at no cost and without obligation.In 60 minutes we analyze the operation, identify the 2-3 problems with the greatest economic impact and propose a concrete solution for each one with its estimated savings.You leave with a written document: what to do, in what order, how much it costs and what result to expect.
